descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average grain diameter

descriptors.name: grain size distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: variance in grain dimensions

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension

descriptors.name: grain boundary area per volume
descriptors.physical_meaning: total boundary interface per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: interfacial area controls diffusion and strength

descriptors.name: texture strength
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of crystallographic preferred orientation

representation.notes: one for random, higher for texture

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: proportion of special coherent twin boundaries
descriptors.rationale: low-energy boundaries enhance grain boundary engineering

descriptors.name: high angle boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of boundaries with misorientation above 15deg

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: excess energy at grain interfaces
descriptors.rationale: thermodynamic driving force for grain growth

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per volume

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: population of boundary types by misorientation
descriptors.rationale: full distribution captures boundary type heterogeneity

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation angle
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic rotation between adjacent grains

descriptors.name: grain orientation spread
descriptors.physical_meaning: intragranular orientation variation within grains
descriptors.rationale: measures local lattice curvature and deformation

descriptors.name: triple junction density
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of grain edge intersections per volume

descriptors.name: grain topology
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of neighboring grains per grain

descriptors.name: subgrain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average size of low-angle dislocation cells
descriptors.rationale: substructure length scale affects recovery kinetics

descriptors.name: stored elastic energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic strain energy from defects

descriptors.name: grain boundary mobility
descriptors.physical_meaning: boundary migration rate per unit driving force

descriptors.name: grain boundary tortuosity
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of actual to straight boundary length

descriptors.name: grain shape factor
descriptors.physical_meaning: deviation from equiaxed spherical grain shape

descriptors.name: recrystallized fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of strain-free recrystallized grains

descriptors.name: grain boundary segregation
descriptors.physical_meaning: solute enrichment at grain boundaries

descriptors.name: grain boundary curvature
descriptors.physical_meaning: local curvature of boundary interface
